subject: Steenee, a Grass-type Pokemon resembling a small fruit with a leafy green parasol-like calyx on its head, bouncing joyfully in a flower-filled outdoor scene
description: Steenee occupies the center of the frame, rendered in pink and white with a broad green leafy canopy atop its round head. It appears to be mid-bounce or mid-dance in a vibrant outdoor setting filled with colorful flowers — pinks, yellows, and greens dominate the foreground. The background is a soft bright sky with diffuse light, giving the scene a cheerful, carefree quality. The figure's rounded body and wide stance convey playfulness and lightness. No other Pokemon or characters are present.
foreground: Steenee mid-bounce over a flower-covered ground
background: bright sky with soft diffuse light
